title: galium gracile var. anglicum
intro: Galium gracile var. anglicum, also known as English woodruff or sweet woodruff, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Galium gracile var. anglicum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and improve sleep quality. Herbal preparations of Galium gracile var. anglicum include infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which can be used to make teas, salves, and perfumes.
